overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in blue armor with a glowing red weapon traversing a snowy mountainous landscape at night. The character runs through open snowfields and enters a rocky forested area under dark cloudy skies, with a mainline quest indicator visible in the corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain slope with distant peaks

agents.ego_description: running steadily across open snow-covered terrain toward distant mountain peaks

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain terrain with patches of exposed rock
snow-capped mountain range visible on the horizon under dark clouds
rocky outcrops scattered across the snowy landscape
heavy dark clouds covering the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character runs across a vast open snowfield at night, with distant mountain peaks visible under a dark overcast sky. The terrain is mostly flat with scattered rocks and sparse vegetation, creating an isolated and cold atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy hillside with dense shrubs and scrub trees

events.description: vegetation density increases as character enters area with dense shrubs and twisted trees

agents.ego_description: running through snow-covered terrain with increasing density of bushes and small trees

entered.detail: thick snow-covered bushes and shrubs lining the path
gnarled and twisted trees with bare branches

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the open snowfield gives way to denser vegetation with twisted scrub trees and thick bushes. The distant mountains fade from view while rocky outcrops become more prominent in the mid-ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest with large boulders and twisted trees

events.description: entering enclosed rocky forest area with large boulders and dense tree cover

agents.ego_description: navigating through rocky terrain with large boulders and twisted trees while continuing uphill

entered.detail: massive rock formations and boulders scattered throughout the forest
rocky outcrops and overhangs creating a sheltered environment

segments.scene_description: The character enters a more enclosed rocky forest area dominated by large boulders and twisted trees. The sky becomes mostly obscured by the dense canopy and rock formations, creating a sheltered, intimate environment as the character navigates the uneven terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character traverses a desolate, open snowfield that gradually closes in into a dense, rocky forest. It begins with the character running across a vast, flat expanse of snow under a dark overcast sky, with distant mountain peaks framing the cold horizon. As the character progresses, the open terrain shifts into a landscape of twisted scrub trees and thick bushes, causing the distant mountains to fade while rocky outcrops emerge in the mid-ground. The scene then narrows as the character enters an enclosed area dominated by large boulders and a heavy canopy of trees. Finally, the environment becomes a sheltered, intimate space where the sky is mostly obscured by rock formations and dense foliage.
